system.description: Either genetics or augmetics have made one of the character's senses are superior to others. When the character gains this Talent, select one of the five senses. The character gains a +10 bonus to any tests specifically involving this sense. Thus, Heightened Senses (Sound) would apply to an Awareness Test to hear distant footsteps, but not to a Ballistic Skill Test or a Weapon Skill Test simply because the character is using his ears.
